zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短线震荡偏弱，关注关键支撑得失
zh.content:
当前价格1986附近，24小时小幅上涨，但整体仍运行于20日均线1991下方，短线结构偏弱。高点受压于2014一带，低点下探至1965，区间震荡格局明显，趋势方向尚未形成有效突破。  

从技术指标看，MACD处于零轴下方且柱值为负，动能仍偏空，显示空头力量尚未完全释放。价格贴近SMA(20)运行，多空争夺激烈，若无法站稳均线之上，反弹持续性可能受限。  

下方关键支撑关注1965及1950整数关口，若跌破或引发加速回落；上方阻力位在2000心理关口及2015前高区域。操作上建议短线高抛低吸为主，突破2000并放量可考虑顺势跟进，跌破支撑则需控制仓位、严格止损。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is trading at 1986.15, posting a modest 0.87% daily gain while remaining slightly below the 20-day simple moving average at 1991.63. Price action continues to compress between 1965 support and 2014 resistance, reflecting short-term consolidation after recent downside pressure. The inability to hold above the 20-day average suggests momentum remains fragile, with the broader near-term bias leaning neutral-to-bearish unless buyers reclaim control above 2000.

Momentum indicators show mixed signals. While RSI data is unavailable, the MACD reading at -8.52 indicates bearish momentum persists beneath the zero line. This suggests that rallies may still encounter selling pressure unless a bullish crossover develops. The narrowing range between daily high and low reflects declining volatility, often preceding a breakout. Traders should monitor whether MACD histogram contraction signals fading downside momentum.

Key support is located at 1965, aligning with the recent intraday low. A decisive break below this level could expose 1940 and potentially the 1900 psychological zone. On the upside, resistance stands at 2000–2014, reinforced by the 20-day SMA overhead. A sustained move above 2015 would shift short-term structure toward bullish continuation and could trigger momentum-driven buying toward 2050.

From a tactical perspective, range trading strategies remain viable while price stays between 1965 and 2015. Conservative traders may wait for confirmation above resistance or below support before entering directional positions. Short-term buyers could consider entries near support with tight risk controls, while breakout traders may look for strong volume expansion before committing capital. Risk management remains critical amid compressed volatility conditions.
